name: snippet-engine-control
description: Engine-neutral control plane for text-expansion systems with contract-first modeling, diagnostics, and diffable export planning.

scripts.test: npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run test:e2e
scripts.doctor:espanso: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('child_process'); const args = ['packages/cli/dist/src/index.js', 'doctor', '--engine', 'espanso']; if (process.env.ESPANSO_DIR) args.push('--dir', process.env.ESPANSO_DIR); const res = spawnSync(process.execPath, args, { stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(res.status);"
